column1: # Paths are repository-relative. Source paths are relative to the OpenTofu
# checkout. Destination paths are relative to this tfconfig checkout.
# Keep this list narrow. Add only files intentionally copied or adapted into
# tfconfig, and preserve MPL-2.0 headers on OpenTofu-derived Go files.
# Raw upstream snapshots should normally sync under _upstream/, which the Go
# tool ignores. Adapted compile-ready code belongs in normal packages after
# review. This avoids breaking `go test ./...` when OpenTofu internals import
# other OpenTofu internals we have not ported.

column3: raw upstream snapshot
